confidence_flag: LEAD ERV-MECHANISM NODE — DIRECTLY MEASURED. ERV-proximal antagonism to SETDB1 (r=-0.27) confirmed by direct perturbation (no longer inferred); matches H3K9me3-eraser mechanism in RA literature; strong selective chemistry (1.3 nM, 38 sub-100nM). Antagonism is modest/locus-specific (rheostat, not switch): nudges ERV-proximal genes, does NOT reverse phenotype (module score & genome-wide null under paralog redundancy).

DISTINCT CANDIDATE — cGAS-AXIS, LITERATURE-ONLY, NOT ERV-VALIDATED. Does NOT show ERV-proximal antagonism in our data (r~0); rationale rests on the SEPARATE cGAS/IFN mechanism (published cGAS literature), not our ERV finding. Strong selective chemistry (4 nM). Do NOT present as our validated eraser.
MECHANISM STRONG / CHEMISTRY THIN — HUSH, robust ERV-enrichment (Part 2); little/no chemical matter.

SUPPORTING MECHANISTIC EVIDENCE, NOT THE DRUG CANDIDATE — also shows ERV-proximal antagonism (r=-0.27, directly measured) but weak chemistry (700 nM, 0 sub-100nM). Corroborates the eraser mechanism; deprioritized as a candidate.
MECHANISM STRONGEST / DRUGGABILITY POOR — primary ERV-enrichment hit but pan-essential; probe exists, selective inhibition implausible.
MECHANISM STRONG / CHEMISTRY THIN — HUSH, robust ERV-enrichment; undrugged.
REGULATORY-HIERARCHY NODE / GENETICALLY UNSUPPORTED + UNDRUGGED — the recruiters, high selectivity in principle, but autoimmune GWAS DEPLETED and no chemical matter; hypothesis-generating only.
UNDERPOWERED MECHANISM / DRUGGABILITY POOR — few up-genes, null ERV-enrichment; broadly essential.
NEAR-NULL (weak KD) — absence of effect not interpretable; undrugged.
